message:
Regenerate conformance and RaptorQ evidence packs for expanded ufunc coverage

All phase2c evidence packs (FNP-P2C-002 through FNP-P2C-007) and RaptorQ
bundle artifacts have been regenerated to reflect the expanded ufunc
operation set added in the preceding commit. This refresh is necessary
because the conformance bundle payload now includes 158 test cases (up
from the previous count), which changes the RaptorQ-encoded data, the
decode proofs, scrub reports, and content hashes throughout the artifact
chain.

Specific changes by artifact group:

- artifacts/baselines/ufunc_benchmark_baseline.json: Updated benchmark
  baseline entries to include timing data for the newly added operations,
  ensuring future performance regression checks cover the full op set.

- artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-002 through FNP-P2C-007: Each packet's
  final_evidence_pack.json, packet_readiness_report.json, and all
  parity_report.*.json files have been refreshed. Most changes are
  timestamp updates, but FNP-P2C-005 (the ufunc conformance packet) has
  substantially larger changes because its RaptorQ parity report now
  encodes the larger 158-case payload, resulting in more encoding symbols
  and updated decode proofs / scrub checksums.

- artifacts/raptorq/: Both benchmark_bundle_v1 and conformance_bundle_v1
  sidecars, decode proofs, and scrub reports have been regenerated. The
  conformance_bundle_v1.sidecar.json grew significantly because the
  underlying conformance data expanded with the new operations.

All evidence packs remain internally consistent: decode proofs verify
against their respective RaptorQ encodings, and scrub reports confirm
data integrity across the full artifact chain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
